author: Eric B.
pros: Good feature set. Good value for the price. Easy of use
cons: I have not used support yet. The downloading of contacts from LinkedIn was a little slow
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reveals the connective tissue in a complex ecosystem
description: Easy, intuitive, and practical. I didn't have to review a library of training videos in order to maximize value with this tool.
author: Yovany J.
pros: It is excellent at pinpointing work email, LinkedIn profiles, and outlining the network path to the contact. The Chrome extension is a lifesaver!
cons: The sync with LinkedIn is slow and bumpy. Also, I wish we could integrate email sequences directly from the Chrome extension. Apollo.io does that very well!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sarah M.
pros: Customer service was really helpful and attentive
cons: Applications within my current position don’t use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Finding this level of detail in connections is extremely difficult without KnowledgeNet
author: Pearce B.
pros: I like the ability to see where there are common connections at my target accounts. This is extremely valuable as a Founding AE and their ability to also pull contact details is just icing on the cake.
cons: It does what I need it to do, I don't really have any cons. Excited to see how the solution further develops.

author: James W.
pros: I like the ease of use and the insights that KN gives me on people
cons: That it doesn’t integrate with more CRMs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool for Salespeople and Leaders
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of Setup Integration with a CRM Connected view of relationships beyond 1st & 2nd degree connections Strength of connections across my network
cons: There are very few issues I've had with the tool. All of my challenges were related to not having a tool prior to Knowledgenet and not fully leveraging the power of the tool in my practice or with my clients.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, it has been very positive and I believe that any negatives are on me. I need to take some real time to delve into what it can really do
author: Frank M.
pros: Ability to see where I have connections and where I need to be increasing my reach out
cons: That I have not had the time to really explore where and how it can assist me. Would be good to know if there is an online resource with quick "how to" videos

author: Dennis B.
pros: I have used KnowledgeNet for my own business and have brought it into 3 other companies to grow their funnel and sales. This is the single best tool to find key contacts that I have used!
cons: My hope is that the product will become better integrated with all CRM platforms to make contact management and lead generation seemless.

description: Great product, great support team, great overall experience.
author: Jorge P.
cons: Not Applicable, I love Kowledgenet.ai, and I promote it constantly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Michael L.
pros: Engagement visibility is critical for prioritizing leads. Well organized, easy to use, and extremely helpful in my day to day.
cons: I dislike how I didn't know about KnowledgeNet.ai sooner!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I love the KnowledgeMap for my network
author: Jennifer N.
pros: KnowledgeNet shows your network and emails very quickly. There's a map with nodes that show all your connections and colleagues in an way that's easy to understand and follow.
cons: Nothing I can see. I like how the extension snaps to whatever site I go.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Gary B.
pros: Ease of Installation and great assistance from Customer Service. Works well with LinkedIn.
cons: Some of my rarer client type SIC codes were not available, but Customer Service acknowledged and worked to support and add.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mark S.
pros: The overall, integrated capabilities of several uses cases in one tool.
cons: There's a bit to learn yet the support is very good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
